geographic_restrictions: Applicants must be enrolled in a graduate program at a U.S. institution; work is based in Washington, D.C.
project_area: Coastal, marine, and Great Lakes science and policy
demographic_requirements: Highly qualified early career professionals (graduate students)
eligibility_summary: Open to graduate students in the U.S. pursuing a degree related to coastal, marine, or Great Lakes science and policy. Applicants must be highly qualified early career professionals.
